journal_entry.description: Purchase of break room refreshments on corporate credit card
journal_entry.rationale: Tea, beverages, and refreshments for employee break room are employee welfare expenses. The full amount including sales tax ($1,320) is expensed. The credit card payment creates a liability (credit card payable).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Break room refreshments for employees are an employee welfare/benefits expense. Paid by corporate credit card, which creates a liability that will be settled when the card is paid. Sales tax is included in the expense amount.
